sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82267" key="peri/stixes" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περίστῐχ-ες</orth> (parox.), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen>, <sense id="n82267.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">placed round in a row</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">περὶ στίχες</ref></xr>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:170" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.170</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
